cake.name: Black Forest Cake
cake.description:
A classic chocolate layered cake made with rich cocoa sponge.
It is filled with whipped cream and juicy cherries between layers.
The top is decorated with chocolate shavings and extra cherries.
It has a perfect balance of sweetness and slight bitterness.
Very popular for birthdays and celebrations.

cake.name: Red Velvet Cake
cake.description:
A soft and moist cake with a deep red color and smooth texture.
Made with a light cocoa flavor blended with buttermilk.
It is layered with creamy and slightly tangy cream cheese frosting.
The texture is soft, fluffy, and melts in the mouth.
A premium cake often served at special occasions.

cake.name: Chocolate Fudge Cake
cake.description:
A rich and dense chocolate cake with deep fudgy layers.
Made using high-quality dark chocolate and cocoa powder.
It has a moist texture with an intense chocolate taste.
Often topped with glossy chocolate ganache.
Perfect for true chocolate lovers.

cake.name: Vanilla Cream Cake
cake.description:
A light and soft sponge cake flavored with pure vanilla.
It is layered with smooth and airy whipped cream.
The taste is mild, sweet, and very comforting.
Perfect for those who prefer simple desserts.
Commonly used in family gatherings and tea time.

cake.name: Strawberry Cheesecake
cake.description:
A creamy cheesecake with a smooth and rich cheese base.
It is topped with fresh strawberry glaze and slices.
The crust is made from crushed graham crackers and butter.
It offers a perfect mix of sweet and slightly tangy flavor.
A favorite chilled dessert for summer.

cake.name: Blueberry Cheesecake
cake.description:
A smooth and creamy cheesecake topped with blueberry sauce.
The blueberries add a sweet and slightly tart flavor.
It rests on a crunchy graham cracker base.
The texture is rich but soft and creamy.
Ideal for dessert lovers who enjoy fruit flavors.

cake.name: Pineapple Cake
cake.description:
A soft sponge cake layered with fresh pineapple pieces.
It is covered with light whipped cream frosting.
The taste is sweet, fruity, and slightly tangy.
Very refreshing and not too heavy to eat.
Commonly served in summer celebrations.

cake.name: Mango Cream Cake
cake.description:
A tropical cake made with fresh mango puree and soft sponge.
It has layers of smooth and creamy whipped topping.
The flavor is rich, fruity, and naturally sweet.
Best enjoyed chilled for extra freshness.
Very popular during mango season.

cake.name: Oreo Chocolate Cake
cake.description:
A rich chocolate cake mixed with crushed Oreo cookies.
It has creamy layers combined with crunchy biscuit bits.
The taste is sweet, chocolatey, and slightly crunchy.
Often topped with extra Oreo decorations.
A modern favorite among young dessert lovers.

cake.name: Carrot Cake
cake.description:
A moist cake made with grated carrots and warm spices.
It includes walnuts for a crunchy texture.
The flavor is lightly sweet with cinnamon aroma.
Often topped with cream cheese frosting.
A slightly healthier dessert option.

cake.name: Coffee Mocha Cake
cake.description:
A flavorful cake combining coffee and chocolate essence.
It has a soft sponge with mocha cream layers.
The taste is bold, slightly bitter, and sweet at the same time.
Perfect for coffee lovers.
Often served in cafes and special occasions.

cake.name: Butterscotch Cake
cake.description:
A sweet cake with rich butterscotch flavor and creamy layers.
It has a crunchy caramel topping for extra texture.
The taste is buttery and very sweet.
Soft sponge makes it easy to eat.
Popular for festive celebrations.

cake.name: Lemon Drizzle Cake
cake.description:
A light and fluffy cake with fresh lemon flavor.
It has a sweet and tangy lemon glaze on top.
The aroma is refreshing and citrusy.
Perfect for tea time snacks.
Simple yet very flavorful dessert.

cake.name: Honey Almond Cake
cake.description:
A nutty cake flavored with natural honey and almonds.
It has a soft texture with crunchy almond pieces.
The sweetness is natural and not overpowering.
Rich in aroma and flavor.
Great for healthy dessert lovers.

cake.name: Rainbow Cake
cake.description:
A colorful cake made with multiple vibrant layers.
Each slice shows different rainbow colors.
It is soft, sweet, and visually very attractive.
Perfect for parties and celebrations.
A fun dessert loved by kids.

cake.name: Tiramisu Cake
cake.description:
A classic Italian dessert made with coffee-soaked layers.
It uses mascarpone cheese for creamy texture.
Topped with cocoa powder for rich flavor.
Soft, smooth, and slightly bitter-sweet.
Very elegant and premium dessert.

cake.name: Matcha Green Tea Cake
cake.description:
A unique cake made with Japanese matcha green tea powder.
It has a light earthy and slightly bitter taste.
Balanced with sweet cream layers.
Soft texture with elegant flavor.
Popular among tea lovers.

cake.name: Coconut Cream Cake
cake.description:
A soft tropical cake flavored with coconut milk and flakes.
It has creamy and fluffy texture.
The taste is sweet and refreshing.
Often decorated with coconut shavings.
Perfect for tropical dessert lovers.

cake.name: Peanut Butter Cake
cake.description:
A rich cake made with creamy peanut butter.
It has a soft and dense texture.
The flavor is nutty, sweet, and slightly salty.
Perfect for peanut lovers.
Often paired with chocolate frosting.

cake.name: Hazelnut Chocolate Cake
cake.description:
A premium chocolate cake enriched with roasted hazelnuts.
It has a rich and nutty chocolate flavor.
Soft sponge layered with creamy filling.
Crunchy hazelnuts add extra texture.
Perfect for luxury dessert lovers.
